overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage of an FBI agent exploring a public restroom, a jail corridor, and a police station office. The clip features high-fidelity game engine graphics with realistic lighting, detailed character models, and atmospheric interior environments typical of a narrative-driven horror game.

FBI agent follows janitor out of restroom into hallway

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a narrow public restroom with white tiled walls and artificial lighting. A janitor in a teal uniform is cleaning a large mirror while the FBI agent observes. The janitor finishes wiping the mirror and exits, with the agent following behind through the doorway.

scene_state.functional_zone: prison cell block corridor with metal bars

events.description: entering the jail corridor through a metal security gate
approaching a cell where a prisoner is standing behind the bars
reaching the end of the corridor and entering the police station office

agents.ego_description: walking steadily down a jail corridor, examining the cells and briefly stopping to look at a prisoner

notable_agents.action: prisoner standing behind bars watching the agent pass by

entered.detail: vertical metal bars forming the cell doors and walls
exposed brick walls lining the corridor
simple beds visible inside the cells
scattered paper and trash on the concrete floor
dark green metal door at the end of the corridor

segments.scene_description: The agent moves through a dimly lit jail corridor lined with brick walls and metal prison bars. The concrete floor is littered with debris. After passing several empty cells, the agent encounters a prisoner standing behind bars around the 32-second mark, then continues to a green door leading to the office area.

scene_state.functional_zone: sheriff's office with reception desk and workstations

events.description: entering a well-lit office with natural sunlight streaming through windows
approaching a desk to examine a computer monitor

agents.ego_description: entering the police station office and approaching a desk to look at a computer screen

notable_agents.action: officer sitting at desk working on a computer
officer standing with arms crossed looking out the window

American flag on a stand next to the desk
desktop computer monitor on the reception desk
windows with horizontal blinds allowing sunlight to filter in
green plants sitting on the windowsill
beige metal filing cabinet with multiple drawers

segments.scene_description: The agent enters a well-lit police station office with wooden paneling and mixed natural and artificial lighting. The space features a reception desk with an American flag, several officers at workstations, and windows with blinds. The agent approaches the desk to examine a computer while other officers work or look out the windows.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a sterile public restroom through a grim jail corridor and into a professional police station office. It begins in a narrow, white-tiled restroom where the camera follows an FBI agent as he watches a janitor in a teal uniform clean a mirror before trailing him through the doorway. As the agent exits, the environment shifts into a dimly lit jail corridor characterized by brick walls, debris-strewn concrete floors, and metal prison bars, passing a lone prisoner before reaching a green door. The scene then opens into a well-lit office space with wooden paneling and a mix of natural and artificial light, featuring a reception desk and an American flag. Finally, the camera moves toward a computer on the desk while officers work at their stations or gaze through window blinds.
